name: AI Architecture Designer
one_liner: ML-first decision support system for architecture planning, model comparison, and AI system design workflows.
summary: A portfolio and applied machine learning project focused on architecture decision support. The system combines supervised ML experiments, dataset-specific evaluation, and an optional LLM layer for post-ML reasoning and architecture guidance.
evidence: Built an ML-first architecture decision support workflow with multiple supervised models.
Structured the project around reproducible evaluation, metrics, and architecture artifacts.
Deployed the API and UI as containerized cloud services.

name: AI Interview Coach
one_liner: Interview practice system with structured feedback, scoring, and LLM-assisted coaching.
summary: A production-style AI application that simulates technical interviews, scores responses, and generates structured coaching feedback. It was built for practical interview preparation with clean API-driven workflows and deployment-ready architecture.
evidence: Implemented interview question generation and structured coaching feedback.
Built scoring and response evaluation workflows.
Deployed the application using a containerized cloud architecture.

name: AI Market Coach
one_liner: Market analysis assistant that turns user questions into structured reasoning and actionable summaries.
summary: A cloud-deployed AI assistant designed to help users interpret market questions through structured outputs, guided reasoning, and a production-style API and UI flow.
evidence: Built an AI workflow for market-focused question answering.
Structured outputs for clearer reasoning and actionable summaries.
Migrated the project to a low-cost production-style deployment setup.

name: Agentic SQL RAG
one_liner: Grounded retrieval system combining SQL, hybrid search, citations, and document-aware AI responses.
summary: A retrieval-augmented generation system that integrates structured storage, hybrid retrieval, grounded responses, evidence citations, and production deployment. It was built as a portfolio-grade system spanning backend, retrieval, evaluation, and UI.
evidence: Implemented hybrid retrieval with database-backed indexing and ranking.
Built grounded response workflows with evidence and citations.
Deployed the API and UI publicly with a production-style architecture.

name: Blueprint Budget AI
one_liner: AI-assisted home planning system for layout ideas, budget estimation, and build-oriented decision support.
summary: A full-stack project focused on helping users explore home-building ideas through budget-aware planning, visual structure, and AI-assisted workflows. It is designed as a practical decision-support tool for home design and planning.
evidence: Designed dashboard-driven workflows for home planning inputs and outputs.
Structured backend logic around budget and planning assistance.
Built the project as a full-stack AI product with room for future visual generation features.

name: Decision-Fragility Simulator
one_liner: Risk and stability scoring system that turns user actions into measurable fragility signals.
summary: A simulation and reporting project designed to model decision fragility through sequential processing, database-backed storage, and interpretable reporting. It was built as a deployable AI and data system with a practical risk lens.
evidence: Built ingestion and analytics workflows to compute fragility scores.
Generated structured reports from stored user action data.
Prepared the project for public deployment with a production-ready container flow.

name: Intrinsic Safety & Ethics Optimizer
one_liner: Safety- and ethics-aware AI system for evaluating decisions, retrieval evidence, and responsible system behavior.
summary: A concept-driven AI project focused on safety, ethics, retrieval, and evaluation workflows. It is designed as a serious portfolio piece centered on intrinsically safer AI decision support.
evidence: Defined a milestone-based architecture centered on safer AI reasoning.
Designed for retrieval, evaluation, and evidence-aware decision support.
Positioned the system as a portfolio project with strong AI governance relevance.

name: Market Guardian
one_liner: Risk-first crypto and forex tracker focused on safer market reading and beginner-friendly decision support.
summary: A financial intelligence project designed around risk awareness, live market visibility, and beginner-safe investing behavior rather than speculative trading. It is intended to combine metrics, guidance, and portfolio tracking.
evidence: Designed a beginner-safe market tracking concept centered on risk awareness.
Defined milestone plans for trade history, portfolio tracking, and AI-assisted guidance.
Positioned the product to differ from typical trackers through safer investing behavior.
